patternType: Deep System Issue - Progressive Fix Failure

failureProgression.issue: Claude CLI cascading with character duplication
failureProgression.solution: Original terminal implementation with basic WebSocket
failureProgression.result: FAILED - Characters still duplicating and cascading

failureProgression.solution: Added ANSI escape sequence filtering in processAnsiSequences()
failureProgression.result: FAILED - Still cascading, sequences not properly handled

failureProgression.issue: Carriage return handling breaking terminal control
failureProgression.solution: Preserved carriage returns, added literal \n to newline conversion
failureProgression.result: PARTIALLY SUCCESSFUL - Fixed display but terminal hangs

failureProgression.solution: Added Claude command detection and helpful messaging
failureProgression.result: FAILED - Terminal still hangs, no user input response

technicalContext.architecture: React Frontend + Node.js Backend + WebSocket + PTY

frontendSigns: onData events firing but no server response
WebSocket shows connected but messages not reaching backend
Terminal input handling extensive debugging shows events trigger
Socket.IO emit calls appear successful but no acknowledgment
backendSigns: Message handlers defined but may not be receiving data

rootCauseHypotheses.description: Frontend using Socket.IO client but backend using raw WebSocket server
rootCauseHypotheses.evidence: Frontend: io('/terminal') vs Backend: new WebSocket.Server()

rootCauseHypotheses.description: Socket.IO vs WebSocket have different message serialization
rootCauseHypotheses.evidence: Frontend emits objects, backend expects JSON strings

rootCauseHypotheses.description: Event handlers bound before connection fully established
rootCauseHypotheses.evidence: Connection status shows connected but handlers don't fire

overconfidenceIndicators: Claimed fixes without testing full communication flow
Focused on surface symptoms rather than architectural validation
